title: SoundBarrier
description: This mod adds a transition to supersonic speed!The sound barrier can be overcome starting from 70 blocks/second.
body:
This mod adds a transition to supersonic speed! IMPORTANT! This mod is customized to the SuperBWarafre mod, the sound barrier in this mod can be overcome starting from ~70 blocks/second. This is done because planes in Superb warfare cannot fly faster. In the future, the mod configuration will be available.
This mod can be used WITHOUT superbwarfare.
